summary: Opt-in docs/DESIGN.md design artifact added. Per the M10 phase definition (META_PHASES.md), the planning gate did NOT apply (additive, no engine or contract changes; code review only). Implementation: templates/design.template.md (one-page, four sections: System sketch, Data flows, Hot spots, Boundaries), with-design profile in capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml, DOC_TEMPLATE_MAP entry, references in CLAUDE/AGENTS templates, agent-description sections in strategy-planner and architecture-red-team, and a When to use DESIGN.md section in USAGE_PATTERNS.md. Code-reviewer pass (artifacts/code-review-m10.md): GREEN-LIGHT WITH CONDITIONS; 1 BLOCKER + 2 MAJORs + 1 MINOR addressed in commit c69d08f. 31 tests green (28 M9 + 3 M10).
reviewer_notes: Strategy-planner: not invoked — M10 was small additive work and did not warrant a planning memo per its phase definition
Architecture-red-team: not invoked — same reason; planning gate did not apply

Code-reviewer (artifacts/code-review-m10.md): GREEN-LIGHT WITH CONDITIONS — 1 BLOCKER (missing existing-project opt-in test), 2 MAJORs (test count claim drift; CAPABILITY_MANIFEST.md not updated for with-design + DESIGN), 1 MINOR (strategy-planner missing 'produces' verb)

All blocker and major findings addressed in commit c69d08f; opt-in upgrade-path test added; META_PHASES.md acceptance criterion language relaxed from brittle count to 'all existing M9 tests still green'; CAPABILITY_MANIFEST.md has built-in profiles table and bootstrap-frozen examples
Findings 5 (template lines >80 cols) and 7 (CLAUDE.template.md trailing newline) deferred as minor polish

deferred_items.tag: M10.x — sync lint between scaffold's own DESIGN.md (none today) and template
deferred_items.description: If/when the scaffold itself adopts the with-design profile, a parallel sync invariant emerges. Not relevant until then.
Box-drawing characters in templates/design.template.md cause 4 lines to render at 82-108 visual columns. Intentional (ASCII diagram); flagged for awareness but not blocking.
templates/CLAUDE.template.md ends without trailing newline (pre-existing; not introduced by M10).
